lobby.title: Game lobby
lobby.discoveryStalled: Still trying to reach other players… The P2P discovery service might be blocked on your network. Check your connection, try switching networks (e.g. mobile data), or ask the other player to refresh.

play.hostActionsHint: Manual override — adjust shots or remove a player.

phase.hostPickLosers: Tap everyone who lost (can be none)

mossa.title: Mossa
mossa.desc: Invent a move everyone must repeat before drinking. If moves already exist, repeat them all. Forget one? Drink twice. Falsely accuse someone? You drink.

beviOoffri.title: Drink or offer
beviOoffri.desc: You choose: drink yourself, or pick someone else to drink.

treAveMaria.title: Three Hail Marys
treAveMaria.desc: You and the players to your left and right — all three drink.

tuEcumpari.title: You and your buddy
tuEcumpari.desc: Pick someone to drink with you. Both drink.

jolly.title: Jolly
jolly.desc: Lucky! You hold the 🃏 token — it absorbs your next lost shot. If someone else draws Jolly, the token passes to them.

pipi.title: Bathroom break
pipi.desc: Free pass. Go to the bathroom, no penalty.

sfida.title: Challenge
sfida.desc: Challenge anyone to rock-paper-scissors (or any quick game). Loser drinks.

setteBum.title: 7 Bum
setteBum.desc: Count up from 1. Instead of multiples of 7 or numbers ending in 7, say "bum". Mess up? Drink.

ventuno.desc: Count together to 21. Each person says 1 or 2 numbers. Saying 2 numbers reverses direction. Whoever says 21 drinks.

storia.title: Story
storia.desc: Make a sentence one word at a time. Each person repeats all previous words and adds one. Mess up? Drink.

zingBoing.title: Zing Boing
zingBoing.desc: Say "zing" to pass clockwise, "boing" to reverse direction. Mess up? Drink.
